body_preview: Mr. Kelly, the rough-in inspection for permit EL-2026-0117 at the Verree Road residence is scheduled for January 20 between 9 and noon. Panel and accessible boxes must be open. Reply to confirm site access.
subject: Rough inspection scheduled - permit EL-2026-0117

body_preview: Confirmed. Panel open, boxes accessible. I'll be on site at 9. Brandon Kelly, Kelly Electric.
subject: Re: Rough inspection scheduled - permit EL-2026-0117

body_preview: Order confirmed: one 200A main panel, twelve 20A breakers, two 50A breakers. Ships Wednesday, pickup or delivery Thursday. Reply if you need the meter base added.
subject: Parts confirmation - 200A panel and breakers

body_preview: Add the meter base. I'll pick up Thursday morning before the job. Brandon.
subject: Re: Parts confirmation - 200A panel and breakers

body_preview: Mr. Kelly, your meter swap request for the Rhawn Street 200A upgrade is logged. A PECO crew can disconnect the morning of January 28. Confirm the panel will be ready.
subject: Meter swap coordination - Rhawn Street service upgrade

body_preview: Panel set night before. 28th morning works. Crew can call my cell when they roll up.
subject: Re: Meter swap coordination - Rhawn Street service upgrade

body_preview: Hi Brandon, your general liability and workers comp policies renew this quarter. Premium holds at $2,400 for the year. Reply to confirm and we'll send the signing packet.
subject: Kelly Electric - liability and workers comp renewal

body_preview: Confirmed. Send the packet, I'll sign from the truck. Same coverage as last year.
subject: Re: Kelly Electric - liability and workers comp renewal

body_preview: Mr. Kelly, the final electrical inspection for permit EL-2026-0142 is set for February 18, afternoon slot. Cover plates on, panel labeled. Confirm readiness.
subject: Final inspection notice - permit EL-2026-0142

body_preview: Ready. Panel labeled, plates on. Afternoon is fine, I'll be on site.
subject: Re: Final inspection notice - permit EL-2026-0142

body_preview: Order received: 1000 ft 12 AWG THHN, 500 ft 10 AWG, two boxes 3/4 EMT connectors. In stock, ready for will-call tomorrow. Net 30 on your account.
subject: Parts confirmation - THHN wire and conduit

body_preview: Mr. Kelly, electrical permit EL-2026-0188 for the 100A service change has been issued. Print the placard and post it at the job. Rough inspection can be scheduled once rough-in is complete.
subject: Permit issued - EL-2026-0188 service change

body_preview: Got it, placard printed. Will call to schedule rough-in end of next week.
subject: Re: Permit issued - EL-2026-0188 service change

body_preview: Mr. Kelly, the panel upgrade at the Glenside job passed third-party inspection. Report attached. No corrections noted. Certificate forwarded to the township.
subject: Inspection report - panel upgrade passed

body_preview: Mr. Kelly, your permit application for a 100A sub-panel addition is received and under review. Plan check usually takes three business days. We will email when the permit is ready to issue.
subject: Permit application received - sub-panel addition

body_preview: Need 20 GFCI receptacles and 10 weather-resistant covers for the Glenside job. Will pick up Friday morning. Put it on the account.
subject: Will-call pickup - GFCI receptacles

body_preview: Ready for Friday will-call. 20 GFCI receptacles, 10 WR covers boxed at the counter under Kelly Electric. Invoiced net 30.
subject: Re: Will-call pickup - GFCI receptacles

body_preview: Order confirmed: ten sticks 1-inch rigid, fittings per list, two LBs. Backordered item is the 2-inch sweep, expected next week. Rest ready for pickup. Reply to split the order.
subject: Parts confirmation - rigid conduit order

body_preview: Split it. Send what's ready, hold the 2-inch sweep for next pickup. Need the rest Thursday.
subject: Re: Parts confirmation - rigid conduit order

body_preview: Mr. Kelly, an inspection slot for the Ridgemont Community Center subpanel work is available October 6, morning. Confirm if you want it ahead of the October event.
subject: Inspection slot opening - Fall Classic venue wiring

body_preview: Take the October 6 morning slot. Work wraps before the tournament on the 10th.
subject: Re: Inspection slot opening - Fall Classic venue wiring

body_preview: Brandon, a couple of your commercial clients have requested an updated certificate of insurance for the new year. Reply with the project names and we'll issue them.
subject: Year-end certificate of insurance request

body_preview: Bringing 6 cases of 12 oz wildflower Thursday for the holiday shelf. Dark buckwheat is gone until next August. Invoice the usual wholesale.
subject: Holiday honey restock - wholesale
